narrativeProgression.summary: Emergency dispatch references your alias instead of your legal profile.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.

threadUpdates.update: Noon Ultimatum: The antagonist sends a noon deadline: open the lockbox publicly or lose your only witness.
Peripheral signal tied to Voicemail waveform anomaly remains unresolved.
Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Voicemail waveform anomaly.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.
NPC language mirrors player choices with unsettling precision.

evidenceDrops.title: Midnight Lockbox - Day 17 call log
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Voicemail waveform anomaly.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox ARG artifact Day 17. Type: call_log. Clue focus: Voicemail waveform anomaly. Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Midnight Lockbox call_log audio cue for day 17. Clue anchor: Voicemail waveform anomaly. Phase: Danger & Direct Involvement. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Voicemail waveform anomaly and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_16.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Voicemail waveform anomaly.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
